prd.oneLiner: Connect parking zones, vehicle registration, allocation and approval, entry-exit history, violation handling, and occupancy analysis.
prd.goal: Reduce peak-time parking inquiries by 30% and improve visitor parking-allocation accuracy.
prd.whyNow: Employee and visitor vehicle details and parking assignments are managed manually, making availability and violation handling slow.
prd.problem: Employee and visitor vehicle details and parking assignments are managed manually, making availability and violation handling slow.
prd.solution: Connect parking zones, vehicle registration, allocation and approval, entry-exit history, violation handling, and occupancy analysis.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: Employee or visitor registering and using parking
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Employee and visitor vehicle details and parking assignments are managed manually, making availability and violation handling slow.

targets.name: Facilities and security parking operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Employee and visitor vehicle details and parking assignments are managed manually, making availability and violation handling slow.

scenarios.text: Employee or visitor registering and using parking completes parking registration and visitor-vehicle pre-registration and checks progress.
Facilities and security parking operations coordinator reviews parking occupancy, violations, and visitor-vehicle reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Reduce peak-time parking inquiries by 30% and improve visitor parking-allocation accuracy.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Parking zone, allocation, and entry-exit history lookup
Parking allocation, changes, exception approval, and violation handling
Parking occupancy, violations, and visitor-vehicle reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
